response.justification: Candidate is a senior/staff engineer with 15+ years of experience, far exceeding the junior/mid-level requirement. Strong technical match on TypeScript, Node.js, React, and full-stack work, but seniority mismatch creates real risk on compensation expectations, role satisfaction, and long-term retention in an entry-level position. Worth a screening call only to gauge motivation for a deliberate downlevel and on-site availability in Berlin.
strengths: Deep TypeScript/Node.js and full-stack experience across multiple production platforms
Based in Berlin with relevant React, REST, and SQL/relational DB exposure
Recent AI/LLM and agent-infrastructure work aligns with nice-to-have qualifications
concerns: Severe overqualification — Staff/Senior level applying for entry-level IC role
PostgreSQL not explicitly listed (primarily MongoDB/MySQL); no Nest.js mentioned
On-site requirement plus likely salary expectations mismatch with junior band
